description_long: This is a classic rectangular wooden picnic table with attached benches on either side, constructed from dark-stained planks. The tabletop consists of several wide, parallel wooden boards, showing visible wood grain and knots, giving it a rustic and sturdy appearance. The benches are similarly constructed, running the full length of the table and supported by robust wooden legs and crossbeams. The supporting structure beneath the tabletop features diagonal braces forming a triangular frame for added stability. The finish is matte, with a slightly rough texture typical of outdoor wooden furniture. There is no visible hole in the center of the tabletop for an umbrella.
description: A dark-stained wooden picnic table with attached benches and a sturdy, rustic design. The table and benches are made from wide planks with visible wood grain and robust support beams.
description_view_0: Front view showing the tabletop and one attached bench, highlighting the thickness of the wood and the simple, sturdy construction.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both benches and the full length of the tabletop, as well as the triangular support structure beneath.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with the opposite bench and tabletop visible, emphasizing the symmetry of the design.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing both benches and the triangular support frame, with wood grain and plank arrangement clearly visible.
attribute_tabletop_support_structure: The tabletop is supported by thick wooden legs connected by diagonal crossbeams forming a triangular frame, providing stability and strength.
